title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues that teaching AI by hand at human speed, emphasizing mathematical foundations over tools, provides durable skills that transcend temporary industry trends. He critiques the "AI-native" trap of assuming tools alone drive learning, and insists people must change AI rather than tools changing people.
